outcome: EVE UI now opens on a repository activity view, lets users browse Evolutions by repository, and surfaces local AI conversation candidates for Codex, Claude Code, OpenCode, and Pi.

added.description: Root activity view shows repository contribution history instead of redirecting to a single Evolution
Sidebar repositories navigate to repo-filtered Evolution activity pages
AI session views show local transcript candidates and can render sanitized local Codex conversations when attached artifacts are missing
EVE UI discovers Codex, Claude Code, OpenCode, and Pi session roots with provider availability

verification.reference: npm run build; npm test; go test ./...; Playwright repository and session smoke test
